DISCOVERY DEPT. 302, AS TO HEARING RE: MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH PRIOR ORDER OF THE COURT. DEFENDANT STIPULATES TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANTS, ANTHONY PANTALEONE AND CARLOS PEREZ RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THREE PREVIOUS ORDERS OF THIS COURT AND APPEARS TO HAVE LOST ALL INTEREST IN PERSUING THIS CLAIM. THE COURT WILL ENTER AN ORDER DISMISSING WITH PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. THE DEFENDANT IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER, AS TO FORM, FOR THE OTHER SIDE AND EMAIL TO IT, IN WORD FORMAT, FOR SIGNATURE TO THE COURT AT RENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Prior Order Of The Court
Off Calendar Mar-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):

Atty. Elika Morris, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF OSTIN & KOTHARY (Tele: 619-744-6587) for Defendants;

No appearance by Plaintiff.

The party to the motion stipulates to the matter being decided by the pro tem. The pro tem judge and counsel for the party to the motion authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ANTHONY PANTALEONI, CARLOS RODRIGUEZ's Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Prior Order Of The Court.

Matter discussed and submitted.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

DEFENDANTS, ANTHONY PANTALEONE AND CARLOS PEREZ RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THREE PREVIOUS ORDERS OF THIS COURT AND APPEARS TO HAVE LOST ALL INTEREST IN PERSUING THIS CLAIM. THE COURT WILL ENTER AN ORDER DISMISSING WITH PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT IT TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORD FORMAT TO THE COURT AT rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: R. Sahatjian, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Rodrigo Barbosas Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One
Off Calendar Oct-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ELIKA MORRIS, Esq. of Law Offices of Ostin & Kothary (Tel: 619-744-6587) for defendants Anthony Pantaleoni and Carlos Rodriguez;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ANTHONY PANTALEONI and CARLOS RODRIGUEZ's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Rodrigo Barbosas Responses To Form Interrogatories Set One.

The Court indicates it received no notice from any party of an intent to contest the tentative ruling, and, therefore, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is granted. Plaintiff failed to timely respond to duly served form interrogatories, so all objections are waived. Plaintiff shall provide verified Code-complaint responses within 30 days of entry of this order. Plaintiff Rodrigo Barbosa shall pay sanctions to defendants' attorney Law Offices of Ostin & Kothary in the amount of $572 within 30 days.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at aaron@minnisandsmallets.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Rodrigo Barbosas Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories Set One
Off Calendar Oct-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ELIKA MORRIS, Esq. of Law Offices of Ostin & Kothary (Tel: 619-744-6587) for defendants Anthony Pantaleoni and Carlos Rodriguez;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS ANTHONY PANTALEONI and CARLOS RODRIGUEZ's Motion To Compel Plaintiff Rodrigo Barbosas Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories Set One.

The Court indicates it received no notice from any party of an intent to contest the tentative ruling, and, therefore, the Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is granted. Plaintiff failed to respond to duly served special interrogatories, so all objections are waived. Plaintiff shall provide verified Code-complaint responses within 30 days of entry of this order. Plaintiff Rodrigo Barbosa shall pay sanctions to defendants' attorney Law Offices of Ostin & Kothary in the amount of $40 representing the filing fee for this motion within 30 days.
